name: autobrr
description: Modern, easy to use download automation for torrents and usenet
compose:
name: slashnode-autobrr
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/autobrr/autobrr:v1.80.0
    container_name: autobrr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7474:7474
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-autobrr_web_data
